name: Peanut Butter Apple Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the flour and baking soda together.
2. In a large bowl, beat the peanut butter and margarine until fluffy.
3. Add the sugar and vanilla to the mixture and beat well.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
5. Stir in the applesauce and milk.
6. Add the flour mixture to the peanut butter mixture.
7. Mix in the oats and wheat germ.
8. Spoon the batter into muffin tins sprayed with non-stick spray.
9. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes, or until done.
10. Cool in the muffin tin.
